headings: BROWNSTONE CONSTRUCTION, LTD. SUBCONTRACT FOR Allegra at Shreveport
text: - Section  6. Applicable  Laws  and  Codes.  The  Subcontract  Work  shall  conform  to  all  applicable  laws, ordinances,  regulations  and  code  requirements.  Subcontractor  bears  sole  and  exclusive  responsibility  for  having included the cost of all material, services, equipment and labor to satisfy all applicable laws, ordinances, regulations and code requirements whether shown on the Contract Documents or not.
